scripts.//: test requires npm dev to be run
scripts.test: docker exec server npm run test && docker exec client npm run test
scripts.test:coverage: docker exec server npm run test:coverage && docker exec client npm run test
scripts.test:local:server: docker exec -it server npm run test
scripts.test:local:client: docker exec -it client npm run test
scripts.test:watch: docker exec -it server npm run test:watch
scripts.prisma:migrate: docker exec -it server npx prisma migrate dev --name
scripts.prisma:reset: docker exec -it server npx prisma migrate reset --force
